home.seoDescription: CFPMIE – vocational training in metal construction, finance management, and electrical engineering in Douala, Cameroon.

hero.heading:
A <1>Training –
<2>A Trade – A Job
hero.description: CFPMIE trains tomorrow's professionals in industrial and management trades.
hero.quote: «After the election period, life goes on… and the future is being prepared.»

practice.title: Hands-on Training
practice.text: 80% practical workshop time. Our learners build school furniture themselves.

diplomas.title: Recognized Diplomas
diplomas.text: AQP/CQP/DQP under MINEFOP supervision, plus first-aid certificate included.

internship.title: Guaranteed Internship
internship.text: 2-month internship with partner companies for every learner.

formations.title: Choose Your Training
formations.description: Three promising sectors to build your professional future.

gallery.heading: «At CFPMIE, our learners don't just watch… they build!»
gallery.description: From day one, our learners get their hands dirty.
gallery.caption: [Illustration photos – learner workshops and achievements]

cta.heading: Ready to build your future?
cta.text: Join CFPMIE and benefit from quality vocational training.

about.seoDescription: Discover CFPMIE, a vocational training center in Douala under MINEFOP supervision.

hero.title: CFPMIE at a Glance
hero.subtitle: Multi-Industrial Vocational Training Center of Excellence.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.quote: «At CFPMIE, our learners don't just watch… they build!»
philosophy.p1: We believe in learning by doing. From day one, our learners are in the workshop welding, wiring, assembling, and creating.
philosophy.p2: Under the supervision of <1>MINEFOP</1>, CFPMIE is committed to providing quality, accessible training adapted to the Cameroonian market.

practice.title: Practice First
practice.text: 80% practical workshop time. Learners build school furniture from the first month.

mentoring.title: Professional Guidance
mentoring.text: Qualified instructors from the professional world accompany each learner.

employment.title: Job Placement
employment.text: Guaranteed internship and job-seeking support for every graduate.

diplomas.title: State Diplomas
diplomas.text: Training recognized by MINEFOP with AQP, CQP, and DQP diplomas.

welding.title: Welding Workshop
welding.desc: MIG/MAG, TIG, MMA welding stations, boiler-making equipment

electrical.title: Electrical Lab
electrical.desc: Didactic boards, industrial cabinets, diagnostic tools

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.desc: Air-conditioned spaces equipped for theoretical learning

lounge.title: Lounge Area
lounge.desc: Pleasant setting for breaks and exchanges

footer.minefop: Under the supervision of <1>MINEFOP</1> – Ministry of Employment and Vocational Training, Cameroon

overview.heading: Overview
overview.body: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.

dataCollected.heading: Data We Collect
dataCollected.body: We collect only the data you voluntarily provide through our contact form: name, phone number, selected training program, and optional message. We also collect anonymized usage data via cookies to improve our website.

purpose.heading: Purpose of Processing
purpose.body: Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiries, process your registration requests, and improve our services. We do not share your data with third parties without your explicit consent.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: Our website uses minimal cookies essential for functionality and analytics. You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information below.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body:
For any questions regarding data protection, you can reach us at:
CFPMIE
Chefferie Makepe Missoké, Douala, Cameroon
Email: contact@cfpmie.com
Phone: +237 659 245 821
